products.title: Andamen Gift Card
products.body_html: Gift Card

products.title: Estate White Cotton Twill Shirt
products.body_html:
"A clean white shirt built with clarity and discipline.
Crafted from 100 percent cotton twill, it delivers a smooth surface with enough body to hold its shape while remaining comfortable and breathable. The semi cutaway collar adds a modern sharpness without straying from classic proportions. Finished with Rajan embroidery on the chest.

A foundational piece for daily rotation, this shirt works seamlessly across casual and polished settings. It is designed to stay relevant year after year, pairing stylishly with denim, chinos, or tailored trousers."

products.title: Cedar Green Cotton Oxford Shirt
products.body_html:
"A classic Oxford shirt rendered in a grounded green tone.
Woven in a cotton elastane blend and finished with a piece-dyed treatment, it offers breathable structure with a touch of stretch for everyday comfort. The button-down collar keeps the silhouette timeless, while the lightweight construction ensures ease through long hours of wear. Finished with subtle Rajan embroidery on the chest.

Designed as a dependable wardrobe staple, this shirt pairs effortlessly with denim or neutral trousers. It brings quiet colour and lasting polish to everyday dressing without feeling seasonal. "

products.title: Mauve Lavender Cotton Oxford Shirt
products.body_html:
"A clean Oxford shirt in a softened lavender tone.
Woven in a cotton-elastane blend and finished with a piece-dyed treatment, it balances breathable structure with comfortable ease. The button-down collar keeps it classic and wearable, while the light-weight build makes it ideal for long days. Finished with restrained Rajan embroidery on the chest.

A refined staple that brings quiet colour to a composed wardrobe. It pairs easily with denim or neutral trousers, and holds its shape with the kind of polish you can rely on."

products.title: Salmon Pink Cotton Twill Shirt
products.body_html:
"A soft-toned shirt with a classic, disciplined build.
Crafted from 50’s cotton twill for a smoother finish and comfortable drape. Regular point collar keeps it sharp. The pocket adds everyday utility. Finished with restrained branding embroidery.

A refined way to wear colour. Understated, elegant, and easy to pair with neutrals."

products.title: Ink Black Cotton Twill Shirt
products.body_html:
"A sharp black shirt grounded in classic twill structure.
50’s cotton twill keeps it smooth, breathable, and easy to wear, while holding a clean silhouette. Regular point collar and pocket detailing maintain a timeless profile. Finished with subtle branding embroidery.

Built for men who prefer clarity. Simple, composed, and consistently correct."

products.title: Liberty Navy Cotton Twill Shirt
products.body_html:
"A classic twill shirt designed for daily wear with polish.
Made from 50’s cotton twill for a smoother finish and a lighter, clean drape. Regular point collar keeps it timeless. Pocket detail adds function. Finished with restrained branding embroidery.

A dependable staple. Smart, minimal, and built to stay in rotation."

products.title: Sage Green Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A green polo designed with texture and restraint.
Cotton-viscose moss knit offers softness, airflow, and a composed silhouette. Minimal chest embroidery completes the look cleanly.

A quiet statement through fabric. Ideal with neutrals and tailored casual bottoms."

products.title: Harbour Blue Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A textured polo with a softer, more fluid hand.
Cotton-viscose moss knit brings breathability and drape, while keeping the surface quietly elevated. Finished with restrained chest embroidery for signature without noise.

A refined choice for warm weather. Comfortable, polished, and distinctly considered."

products.title: Cloud White Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A crisp polo with controlled structure.
Cotton-lycra piqué adds breathable texture with comfort, designed to stay polished through wear. Subtle chest embroidery keeps the finish measured.

A clean essential. Best with chinos, linen trousers, and summer tailoring."

products.title: Ash Grey Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A refined neutral in a structured knit.
Cotton-lycra piqué offers comfort with form, designed to drape cleanly and hold its shape. Finished with subtle chest embroidery.

A quiet wardrobe stabiliser. Easy, composed, and consistently wearable."

products.title: Coal Black Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A black piqué polo built for repeat wear.
Cotton-lycra construction adds ease while maintaining a sharp silhouette. The piqué texture keeps it classic. Restrained embroidery finishes it quietly.

A dependable piece. Polished enough for evenings, easy enough for daily rotation."

products.title: Dune Khaki Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A structured polo with added comfort and resilience.
Cotton-lycra single tuck piqué gives it breathable texture and shape retention, ideal for long wear. Finished with restrained chest embroidery.

A refined casual essential. Clean with chinos, correct with trousers."

products.title: Merlot Burgundy Cotton Jersey Polo
products.body_html:
"A deep-toned polo designed to feel quietly elevated.
Crafted from 24s compact cotton single jersey for durability and clean drape. Minimal chest embroidery completes the finish.

An easy evening staple. Rich in tone, restrained in execution."

products.title: Amber Yellow Cotton Jersey Polo
products.body_html:
"A brighter tone, built with the discipline of a staple.
24s compact cotton jersey gives it structure and longevity while remaining breathable. Finished with minimal chest embroidery for a controlled identity.

For days when you want colour without abandoning refinement."

products.title: Cobalt Blue Cotton Jersey Polo
products.body_html:
"A classic polo with a clean, composed feel.
Made from 24s compact cotton single jersey, it balances comfort with durability and a smoother finish. Subtle chest embroidery keeps it understated.

An everyday essential that holds its colour story and silhouette with grace."

products.title: Caramel Beige Cotton Jersey Polo
products.body_html:
"A clean polo designed for daily reliability.
Crafted in 24s compact cotton single jersey, it offers durability, softness, and better shape retention over time. Finished with subtle chest embroidery for a restrained signature.

A straightforward staple. Quiet, dependable, and meant for repeat wear."

products.title: Ochre Mustard Cotton Dobby Shirt
products.body_html:
"A warmer tone, anchored by serious fabric.
Made from 100% cotton with dobby stripe texture, it delivers depth and structure with a clean silhouette. Regular point collar keeps it classic. Bartack detailing adds durability.

Designed to bring colour without noise. Rich, refined, and built to wear well."

products.title: Palm Green Cotton Resort Shirt
products.body_html:
"A relaxed shirt with refined texture and easy shape.
100% cotton construction with all-over structure gives it a cleaner drape than typical casual shirts. Resort collar keeps it laid-back. Bartack detailing adds strength.

A warm-weather staple that feels intentional. Best with chinos, linen trousers, and minimal styling."

products.title: Lagoon Blue Cotton Resort Shirt
products.body_html:
"A relaxed resort shirt with a structured fabric hand.
Crafted in 100% cotton with an all-over textured finish, it carries body while staying breathable. Resort collar keeps it effortless. Bartack detail adds durability.

Ideal for warm-weather dressing with standards. Clean, relaxed, and quietly premium.

products.title: Garnet Red Cotton Dobby Shirt
products.body_html:
"A bold-toned stripe, executed with restraint.
Made from 100% cotton with dobby stripe texture, it’s designed to feel substantial and refined, especially given its heavier weight. Regular point collar keeps it classic. Bartack detailing reinforces wear points.

A statement through fabric and tone, not excess. Best with clean, neutral trousers."

products.title: Sand Khaki Cotton Shirt
products.body_html:
"A heavier-weight textured shirt with quiet definition.
The 100% cotton build and all-over structured stripe give it body and presence. Finished with a regular point collar and bartack detailing for reinforcement.

A classic piece for men who like substance in their shirting. Built to hold shape through long days."

products.title: Harbour Blue Cotton Dobby Shirt
products.body_html:
"A striped shirt that stays grounded and wearable.
Built in 100% cotton with dobby stripe texture, it reads refined without feeling formal. Regular point collar and bartack detailing bring durability and finish.

A reliable option for everyday elevation. Pairs stylishly with neutrals and denim."

products.title: Olive Green Cotton Dobby Shirt
products.body_html:
"A half-sleeve shirt with a richer woven character.
The 100% cotton dobby check construction adds structure and depth, designed to feel substantial and refined. Regular point collar keeps the silhouette classic. Pleats add ease.

A strong warm-weather option that looks better with wear. Best paired with chinos."

products.title: Ash Grey Cotton Dobby Shirt
products.body_html:
"A textured striped shirt done with restraint.
Made from 100% cotton with dobby stripe detailing, it adds quiet interest while keeping the palette timeless. Regular point collar frames the look cleanly.

Designed for men who prefer texture over loud pattern. Polished, dependable, and easy to pair."

products.title: Canyon Khaki Cotton Dobby Shirt
products.body_html:
"A heavier dobby shirt designed to hold its shape.
Crafted in 100% cotton with an all-over textured dobby, it brings depth and structure without needing pattern. Regular point collar keeps it classic. Restrained branding embroidery finishes it cleanly.

A workhorse dressed like a staple. Made for repeat wear, and built to last."

products.title: Dune Khaki Linen Shirt
products.body_html:
"A textured woven shirt with a softer, more fluid hand.
The lyocell-linen blend brings breathability with a gentle sheen and a composed drape. Finished with a button-down collar and pocket detail, designed for daily wear that still feels elevated.

A quiet essential for warmer months. Polished with trousers, easy with denim."

products.title: Pearl White Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A relaxed polo with a richer surface story.
Two-tone structured pointelle adds depth while keeping the palette quiet and versatile. Crafted in 100% cotton, it’s breathable, polished, and designed to drape well. Short placket keeps it neat.

A refined warm-weather staple. Minimal in look, substantial in feel."

products.title: Walnut Brown Cotton Polo
products.body_html:
"A relaxed polo with texture built into the cloth.
Crafted in 100% cotton with a structured pointelle, it offers breathability with body. Comfortable, yet composed. Short placket keeps the front clean.

Relaxed without being sloppy. Made for long wear and effortless pairing with tailored bottoms."
